senses.gloss: to thunder, roar (especially of cannon); to roll, rumble, grumble, peal (of thunder)
to be frail, delicate, brittle, fragile
to be pliable, to be soft and weak (of a stick)
to bend from its own weight (of a plant)

examples.text: ويعاني أبو ثريا من بتر في القدمين إثر قصف إسرائيلي عام 2008، إلا أنّ ذلك لم يمنعه من المشاركة في المواجهات على الحدود.
examples.english: Abu Thuriya suffers a mutilation of the feet following an Israeli bombardment in the year 2008, but this has not held him off in taking his part in action at the borders.

senses.gloss: to lead a life of opulence
